findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark. [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark [<main>]

Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable [<main>]

findings.description: The italic formatting on the document titles 'Draft Cape Fear River Water Supply Evaluation' and 'Draft Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocation Recommendations' is removed in the HTML version.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'Draft Cape Fear River Water Supply Evaluation' and 'Draft Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocation Recommendations' are rendered in italics. In the HTML, these titles appear in regular (non-italic) text within quotation marks.
